strengths: 18+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production
Recent practical experience with AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
concerns: No principal/director-level scope: career history is senior/staff IC work, not organization-wide technical strategy or influence
AI experience is shallow and recent (~1 year of agent tooling); no recognized AI expertise, ML depth, or shipped AI products at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of advising executives, strategic customers, or partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap vs. director-level strategy role
Meets 15-year experience minimum with founder/startup background

response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the experience minimum and shows strong craftsmanship, breadth, community engagement, and genuine entrepreneurial initiative. However, this role is a director-level IC position centered on AI strategy, and the resume demonstrates neither recognized AI expertise nor experience operating at principal scope — shaping product direction, advising strategic customers, or leading disruptive technical initiatives across an organization. The AI-relevant work is recent and tooling-focused rather than strategic or research-grade, making the fit for this specific role weak despite solid engineering fundamentals.
